productDisplayName: Crocs Unisex Basic Black Flip Flop
description: Originally designed for boaters and fishermen to have a firm foot even on slippery surfaces, crocs has gone a long way in creating footwear for those who demand comfort to the T. Replete with several benefits such as the shoe moulding to your feet with just the body warmth, it's a hot favourite among most people. Incredibly easy to clean, Crocs makes for a great footwear when working in the garden or in wet and messy conditions.   Upper Single piece upper of straps and footbed made of EVA material that moulds to the foot shape offering ample ergonomic comfort Massage nubs on the footbed that is fungus, bacteria and odour resistant Mild heel cup on the footbed to support the heel Outsole Slip resistant outsole Multi-directional textured leaf-shaped grooves in the forefoot and backfoot for ample grip, stability and comfort Slipper care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
